summary: Initial GitHub Pages structure with major pages, JSON data, practice engine, mock engine, resources and trial form.
Expanded test groups, tests, skills, subjects, topics, sample questions, mocks, resources, study plans, reviews and media.
Added FAQ, announcements, pathways, homepage stats, filtered resources and searchable help content.
Added Choose My Test, Compare Tests, Glossary, test formats and decision guide.
Added strategies, common mistakes and daily plan checklist with browser-saved completion.
Added worksheets, assignments and score guide for class and teacher use.
Added roadmap, changelog, contributor guide and question-bank targets for future expansion.
Added vocabulary bank, formula bank and curated question sets for deeper study content.
Added diagnostic test, flashcards and browser-saved error log for stronger student self-assessment.
Added premium notes preview page with structured sample notes, related resources and WhatsApp purchase flow.
